failure.message: codigo-pilot.spec.ts:38:7 CODIGO compact hero shows Create Session CTA

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › codigo\codigo-pilot.spec.ts:38:7 › CODIGO Pilot — Use Cases (80%) › CODIGO compact hero shows Create Session CTA

failure.message: codigo-pilot.spec.ts:166:7 FSD Floor tab shows seat nodes (no MiniMap)

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › codigo\codigo-pilot.spec.ts:166:7 › CODIGO Pilot — Edge Cases (80%) › FSD Floor tab shows seat nodes (no MiniMap)
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByTestId('codigo-seat-node').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 12000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 12000ms - waiting for getByTestId('codigo-seat-node').first()
172 | await configPromise; 173 | await page.getByTestId('tab-floor').or(page.getByRole('button', { name: /Floor/i })).first().click(); > 174 | await expect(page.getByTestId('codigo-seat-node').first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 12000 }); | ^ 175 | await expect(page.locator('.react-flow__minimap')).toHaveCount(0); 176 | }); 177 | at C:\Users\Dwayne Clark\Projects\Hookahplus\apps\app\e2e\codigo\codigo-pilot.spec.ts:174:64
